creator: dvwerks@gmail.com
text:
I am having trouble on Rockchip RK3568 ROCK3A boards PCIe.
This board has two M2 slots for PCIe. 
A PCIe 2.0 bus on M.2. 2242 on top of board and the normal bottom PCIe Slot.

I am testing with 15-CURRENT and this patch. previously I have had issues with PCIe(b) bus hanging. I exit to u-boot and do a "pci enum" it allows the board to boot. FreeBSD can see a device in the slot but not attach drivers.
testing: Wireless ath/iwl or AHCI SATA card. intel 211AT on M.2.
So I made uboot script to run "pci enum" and "nvme scan" ect.. 
As workaround to bootup 15-CURRENT.

Now with this patch I get further. No longer do i need to intervene at uboot.

But I get a weirg ERRNO error. Maybe related to ERRNO 3. Can capture more.

Should I start a new bugzilla request for help or is this report OK??


Thank you everyone.

I am going to test this patch against RockPi4A -CURRENT too to test the changes.
Reports here OK?
